title: Token-opt: role-scoped instruction digests — full CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md stack injected ~24x/cycle measured at +20 percent cost in 2026 research; phases get role-scoped digests
summary: Evaluate per-phase instruction payloads: a scout does not need ship-gate rules; generate role-scoped digests from the SSOT (single-source-with-projection, like skills generate) and inject those; A/B one batch to verify no quality regression before default flip. GATED: defer until token-telemetry-s7 ships (measured baseline re-ranks these by actual top consumers). Research: knowledge-base/research/token-concurrency-2026/ (papers.md 5.4).
acceptance: Digests generated from SSOT (no hand-maintained copies)
per-phase injected instruction bytes drop >50 percent for narrow roles
one shadow batch shows no verdict-quality regression
